summary: Batch 5.6 Student Platform Fixes - All features verified. Backend: 9/9 tests passed. Frontend: All UI features working. Available-teachers endpoint strict filtering works, profile update returns user doc, schedule calendar has all 3 legend colors, booking modal has all required elements, PhoneInput uses Malaysia default, onUserUpdate wires correctly.
critical_code_review_comments: GET /api/booking/available-teachers requires both date AND time params - returns empty without both (strict filtering)
PUT /api/auth/update-profile returns { message, user } where user is the updated document
MySchedule ScheduleCard uses dynamic status: Completed (green), Missed (gray for past scheduled), Upcoming (blue for future scheduled)
BookingModal Step 2 fetches teachers ON STEP TRANSITION with date+time params - no teachers shown if no availability
AccountPage uses react-phone-input-2 with country='my' default (Malaysia +60)
onUserUpdate prop wired through App.js ProtectedRoute -> StudentDashboard -> AccountPage for immediate state sync
seed_data_creation: Created test student account via API for UI testing
context_for_next_testing_agent: Batch 5.6 student fixes verified. Key findings: (1) Available-teachers endpoint requires BOTH date AND time params - empty without both, (2) Profile update returns full user document for immediate state sync, (3) Schedule calendar legend has 3 colors: Upcoming (blue), Completed (green), Missed (gray), (4) Booking modal Step 2 shows 'No teachers available' when no availability slots match, (5) PhoneInput uses Malaysia +60 default

bug_1_calendar_status_logic.details: ScheduleCard displays dynamic status based on current time vs end_time

bug_2_booking_wizard_strict_filtering.details: GET /api/booking/available-teachers requires date AND time params

behavior.date_and_time: Returns teachers with matching availability slots

bug_3_teacher_profile_quick_view.details: BookingModal Step 2 has Eye icon button next to each teacher
modal_features: Tier badge (Elite/Rated) based on total_classes and rating
Video section hidden when no video_intro

bug_4_profile_persistence.details: PUT /api/auth/update-profile returns updated user doc, onUserUpdate wired
bug_4_profile_persistence.flow: AccountPage -> handleSave -> API returns { user } -> onUserUpdate(data.user) -> state updates

elements_verified: Book Class button opens booking modal
Duration selector (15/30/60 min with credit costs)

booking_modal_step_2.details: Shows 'No teachers available' when no availability matches
booking_modal_step_2.note: Expected behavior - strict filtering requires teacher availability for that slot

mocked_apis.stripe_payments: MOCKED - Stripe payment processing is mocked
mocked_apis.bank_payouts: MOCKED - Teacher bank payouts saved to DB but no actual transfer
